Let $P$ be an interior point of a triangle of area $T$. Through the point $P$,
draw lines parallel to the three sides, partitioning the triangle into three
triangles and three parallelograms. Let $a, b$ and $c$ be the areas of the
three triangles. Prove that $\sqrt{T} = \sqrt{a} + \sqrt{b} + \sqrt{c}$.
